fields.name: Magic Pumpkin Pie
fields.description: A sweet and fluffy pie made with magical pumpkins.
fields.ingredients: Magic pumpkin, flour, sugar, eggs, spices.

fields.name: Hufflepuff Cinnamon Cookies
fields.description: Crunchy cookies with a touch of magical cinnamon.

fields.name: Golden Honey Bread
fields.description: Soft bread made with magical bee honey.

fields.name: Enchanted Vegetable Soup
fields.description: A comforting soup with color-changing vegetables.

fields.name: Mini Dragon Cake
fields.description: A cake that looks like a tiny dragon and spits sparks.
fields.ingredients: Flour, eggs, sugar, fake dragon scales.

fields.name: Flying Cloud Ice Cream
fields.description: Ice cream that floats in the air before being eaten.

fields.name: Mandrake Leaf Tea
fields.description: Relaxing tea that whispers when you drink it.

fields.name: Golden Badger Banquet
fields.description: A feast that magically appears on the Hufflepuff common table.

fields.name: Happiness Jelly Potion
fields.description: A jelly that makes you feel euphoric when eaten.

fields.name: Eternal Kindness Cake
fields.description: A cake that never ends and always tastes like your favorite flavor.
